description_long: This object is a long-barreled firearm with a sleek, black metallic finish and a distinct pistol-style grip. The frame is compact, with a pronounced trigger guard and a straight, elongated barrel extending from the main body. The grip appears to be made of a darker, possibly polymer or wood material, contrasting with the metallic upper receiver and barrel. The top of the receiver features a simple, low-profile sight, and the overall design is reminiscent of a target or sporting pistol with an extended barrel. There is no visible stock, and the magazine is not externally apparent, suggesting an internal or integrated magazine system. The object is streamlined, with minimal external attachments or embellishments.
description: A sleek, black long-barreled firearm with a pistol grip and minimal external features, featuring a metallic finish and a simple sight.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the barrel, the pistol grip, and the trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the narrow profile of the firearm.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the grip, trigger guard, and the extended barrel.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the grip and the alignment of the barrel with the receiver.
